<!-- Synced from `/Users/hu_zhehao/Desktop/zzzhehao/note/evolution/MSc EvoSys Course/40.03.00 index - Evolutionary Systematics.md` -->

This folder was originally constructed with notes from the M.Sc. course Evolutionssystematik (2023) and organized as a self-containing repo on [github](https://github.com/zzzhehao/EvoSys). The repo is now locally moved under `Public Repository`.

## Table of Content

- [01 Prior Concepts](01%20Prior%20Concepts.md)
- [02 Phylogeny Fundamentals](02%20Phylogeny%20Fundamentals.md)
- [03 Phylogenetic Analysis](03%20Phylogenetic%20Analysis.md)
- [04 Bayesian Inference](04%20Bayesian%20Inference.md)
- [05 Mutation, Substitution, Sequence Evolution](05%20Mutation,%20Substitution,%20Sequence%20Evolution.md)
- [06 Phylogenetic Marker](06%20Phylogenetic%20Marker.md)
- [07 Coalescent Theory](07%20Coalescent%20Theory.md)
- [08 Phylogenomics](08%20Phylogenomics.md)
- [09 Phylogenetic Comparative Methods (PCM)](09%20Phylogenetic%20Comparative%20Methods%20(PCM).md)
- [10 Molecular Clocks](10%20Molecular%20Clocks.md)
- [99 Concept Checklist](99%20Concept%20Checklist.md)
